englishDefinitions: (figurative) To relent; to grant approval against one's initial will.
persianTranslation: فرو ریختن به سمت داخل یا پایین.
(تصویری) رها کردن. اعطای تأییدیه بر خلاف میل اولیه.
examples: The roof caved in under the weight of the snow.
He caved in the side of the barrel with a single well-placed kick.
After he asked me a few times, I finally caved in and had a slice of cake.
